meta_description: Need flexible manufacturing for complex part mixes? Protolabs makes it easy to order low-volume, high-mix parts with 3DP, CNC, injection molding, and sheet metal.

sections.heading: Talk with Our Team
sections.text: close Talk with Our Team Hello! We just need a few bits of information then a manufacturing expert will reach out to you directly to see we how can partner on a future production project. Thank you! We've received your request and a member of our team will reach out shortly. First Name Last Name Company Email Phone Number (optional) Project Description Which manufacturing service(s) are you interested in? Injection Molding CNC Machining 3D Printing Sheet Metal Fabrication Decide Later Are these parts subject to ITAR or other export restrictions? Yes No Send To Our Team

sections.heading: Manufacturing Processes for Low-Volume, High-Mix Production
sections.text: Manufacturing Processes for Low-Volume, High-Mix Production Injection Molding CNC Machining 3D Printing Sheet Metal Fabrication chevron_left chevron_right Injection Molding Ideal when you need consistent, high-quality plastic parts in small batches. Rapid tooling keeps costs down, even when you're producing several part variations and configurations. Learn More Fast tooling for short-run plastic parts 100+ plastic, elastomeric, and silicone rubber materials Automated CMM for fast, in-house quality documentation CNC Machining Delivers precise results with excellent material flexibility, which is perfect for low-volume production with tight tolerances. It’s especially useful for parts made fr...

sections.heading: Injection Molding
sections.text: Injection Molding Ideal when you need consistent, high-quality plastic parts in small batches. Rapid tooling keeps costs down, even when you're producing several part variations and configurations. Learn More

sections.heading: CNC Machining
sections.text: CNC Machining Delivers precise results with excellent material flexibility, which is perfect for low-volume production with tight tolerances. It’s especially useful for parts made from metals or engineering-grade plastics. Learn More

sections.heading: 3D Printing
sections.text: 3D Printing Offers the most flexibility, letting you produce complex geometries and make design tweaks quickly. It’s great for low-volume batches, when you need speed and customization. Learn More

sections.heading: Sheet Metal Fabrication
sections.text: Sheet Metal Fabrication A reliable choice for sturdy, functional parts like brackets or panels. It’s well suited for low-volume, high-mix production thanks to its quick setup and versatile material options. Learn More

sections.heading: Materials for Low-Volume, High-Mix Production
sections.text: Materials for Low-Volume, High-Mix Production We offer a wide range of materials that are excellent for low-volume, high-mix manufacturing because they’re easy to work with, available in small batch quantities, and cover a broad range of mechanical and cosmetic requirements.

sections.heading: Quality Assurance Across Every Run
sections.text: Quality Assurance Across Every Run Whether you’re ordering five parts or fifty thousand, quality is built into every step. Our industry-standard procedures and certifications ensure traceability, speed, regulatory compliance and confidence in every order. CMM inspection report First Article Inspection (FAI) Dimensional Inspection Report (DIR) PPAP Material Certificates + Certificate of Analysis Conflict Minerals Reporting REACH + RoHS Certificates Prop65 Industry Certifications: ISO 9001 and AS 9100 Certificate of Conformance (CoC) Industry Certifications (Protolabs Network): ISO 13485, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, and ISO TS16949

sections.heading: Benefits of Low-Volume, High-Mix Manufacturing With Protolabs
sections.text: Benefits of Low-Volume, High-Mix Manufacturing With Protolabs Protolabs makes low-volume, high-mix production simple by combining digital automation, flexible manufacturing capabilities, and an extensive global partner network.

sections.heading: End-to-End Simplicity
sections.text: End-to-End Simplicity Manage complex part mixes through one flexible platform. Consolidate vendors from prototyping to end-of-life Supports complex assemblies and SKUs No minimum order quantities or supplier overhead

sections.heading: Built-In Agility
sections.text: Built-In Agility Respond fast to design updates and changing demand. Make quick-turn revisions and configuration changes Scale from prototype to production on your terms Reduce risk with low tooling and inventory costs

sections.heading: Quality You Can Count On
sections.text: Quality You Can Count On Get consistent results no matter the mix or volume. Automated factories plus 250+ vetted global partners ISO 9001, ISO 13485, and AS9100-certified quality Traceable workflows and thorough documentation

sections.heading: Applications of Low-Volume, High-Mix Manufacturing
sections.text: Applications of Low-Volume, High-Mix Manufacturing Low-volume, high-mix manufacturing is a good fit for industries that need to quickly produce a wide range of custom parts in small batches. Here’s how it works across a few key sectors

sections.heading: Medical
sections.text: Medical Used for making small batches of parts that need to meet strict quality standards. Also works well for early product runs and quick changes. Learn More

sections.heading: Aerospace
sections.text: Aerospace Useful for producing lightweight parts in small batches for testing, certifications, and repairs. Learn More

sections.heading: Automotive
sections.text: Automotive Great for custom or low-run parts like interior features, service parts, or test components. Saves time and tooling costs when making updates or new models. Learn More

sections.heading: Robotics
sections.text: Robotics Speeds up how quickly custom parts or assemblies can be made and tested, which is important when projects change or need unique setups. Learn More

sections.heading: Consumer Electronics
sections.text: Consumer Electronics Makes it easier to offer many product versions (like colors or features) without overstocking. Helps get new models to market faster. Learn More
